title: Robotics Software Intern
description: Join our robotics software team to build software for manipulators and mobile robots. Requirements include Python, C++, Linux, sensors, debugging, system integration, and hands-on testing with hardware. Experience with ROS, embedded systems, and mechatronics is preferred.

title: Firmware Engineering Intern
description: Develop firmware for ARM microcontrollers using C. Work with schematics, lab debugging tools, serial interfaces, and bring-up. Familiarity with PCB design, sensors, and embedded testing is a plus.

title: Backend Platform Intern
description: Build backend APIs using Java, distributed systems, cloud services, Kubernetes, and SQL. Robotics experience is not required.
